title: Python podman/varlink stopped status
body:
# **kind bug**

**Description**

On Fedora 28, many python podman integration tests fail with podman <= 0.10.1.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Modify ``.cirrus.yml`` so only the ``image_name: "fedora..."`` line is un-commented.

2. Modify ``contrib/cirrus/integration_test.sh`` to run the following commands for fedora:

```
make install.tools
make
make install PREFIX=/usr ETCDIR=/etc
make localintegration
```

3. Temporarily commit, and push into upstream PR.

**Describe the results you received:**

Many integration tests fail, particularly ``test_create`` [w/o temporary band-aid](https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1635/files#diff-707c5769a9a7943fee6b9fd8e776c710R67)

**Describe the results you expected:**

The ``test_create`` (and hopefully other) integration tests pass on Fedora.
